description: Thai-context compliance risk register (rule #6). Each risk: likelihood/impact (low/med/high), the Thai legal source, the NIRVA mitigation, and links to controls/rules. Statutory specifics marked [verify] — confirm against current law before relying on them.

risks.name: Underpayment vs minimum wage / OT
risks.source: พ.ร.บ.คุ้มครองแรงงาน 2541 (LPA); provincial minimum-wage notifications
risks.consequence: Back-pay, fines, labour-court claims, reputational damage, loss of client trust.
risks.mitigation: Rules PAY-003/004 enforce OT & wage floor at payroll time; verified hours remove disputes.

risks.name: Unlawful personal-data processing
risks.consequence: Administrative fines to ฿5M, criminal liability, civil claims, client offboarding.
risks.mitigation: SOP-PDPA-INTAKE + Rules PDPA-001..005: consent for biometrics, RoPA, DSAR/breach workflows, encryption.

risks.name: Social Security non-remittance / late filing
risks.source: พ.ร.บ.ประกันสังคม (Social Security Act)
risks.consequence: Surcharge/penalty, employee benefit gaps, SSO inspection.
risks.mitigation: Rule PAY-005 computes & schedules SSO remittance with the payroll run.

risks.name: WHT/VAT errors & late returns
risks.consequence: Surcharge 1.5%/mo + penalty, RD audit, disallowed expenses.
risks.mitigation: Rules TAX-001/002/003 auto-apply WHT/VAT, validate tax invoices, prep returns.

risks.name: Unlicensed/uncertified security guards
risks.source: พ.ร.บ.ธุรกิจรักษาความปลอดภัย 2558 (Security Business Act)
risks.consequence: Penalties, contract voidance, liability if incident occurs with unlicensed guard.
risks.mitigation: Rule ISO-003 blocks assignment without valid licence/training; training matrix tracked.

risks.name: Occupational safety incident
risks.source: พ.ร.บ.ความปลอดภัย อาชีวอนามัยฯ 2554; ISO 45001
risks.mitigation: SOP-FM-PTW + Rules OHS-001/002: permit-to-work, competency, near-miss capture.

risks.name: Procurement fraud / bribery
risks.consequence: Financial loss, criminal exposure, debarment from tenders.
risks.mitigation: SOP-PROC-P2P + Rules PROC-002/003/004: split detection, vendor DD, bank-match block.

risks.name: Ghost employees / fake attendance
risks.consequence: Direct payroll & billing leakage, client SLA breach, fraud liability.
risks.mitigation: SOP-WF-CHECKIN + Rules WF-002/003/004: verified-only headcount, anomaly flags, reconciliation.

risks.name: Missing work rules / non-compliant contracts
risks.source: LPA (ข้อบังคับเกี่ยวกับการทำงาน required when ≥10 employees); foreign-worker permits
risks.mitigation: NIRVA DOCS templates + ISO-001 document control; HR checklist enforced.

risks.name: Inadequate accounting records / late statutory accounts
risks.source: พ.ร.บ.การบัญชี (Accounting Act); TFRS/TFRS for NPAEs; DBD filing

risks.name: Ungoverned AI / automated decisions
risks.source: PDPA (automated decision-making); ISO 42001; emerging ETDA AI guidance
risks.consequence: Unfair/illegal decisions, privacy breach, loss of trust, future-law exposure.
risks.mitigation: SOP-AI-AGENT + Rules AI-001/002: human-in-the-loop, full action logging.

risks.name: Loss of ISO certification (tender prerequisite)
risks.consequence: Disqualification from tenders that mandate certification; revenue loss.
risks.mitigation: Continuous control monitoring (AUT-06); CAPA timeliness (ISO-002); always-audit-ready posture.
